meaning: Universal Postal Union,万国邮政联盟
examples: She is the first female rural postal worker to take the stage at a meeting of the UPU.
The suitable content of UPU were determined by the testing of impact resistance, hardness and HDT of the cured resins toughened with UPU.
Taking "customers and credit first" as its sole operation principle, UPU provides the customers with the best quality products and services.
